creator: vrwmiller@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #1)

net/samba410 fails as demonstrated below with SAMBA4_BUNDLED_LDB=no. The message indicates LDB 1.5.[89]* is necessary for Samba 4.10 when using the system LDB, but databases/ldb15 is 1.5.6. It seems samab410 is already broken particularly when using system LDB as opposed to bundled LDB.


Checking for system pyldb-util (>=1.5.8 <=1.5.999)                                : not found 
ERROR: System library pyldb-util of version 1.5.8 not found, and bundling disabled
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to timur@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach the
"/wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/samba410/work/samba-4.10.17/bin/config.log" including
the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea
to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. a
/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net/samba410
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for samba410-4.10.17
